title: The Apprentice (disambiguation)
content:
'''The Apprentice''' may refer to one of the following:

==Legends==
*'''[[Galen Marek]]''', also identified as "'''the Apprentice'''"

==Real world==
*"'''[[The Apprentice (short story)|The Apprentice]]'''," a short story published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]
*"'''[[The Apprentice (comic story)|The Apprentice]]'''," a comic story featured in ''[[Star Wars Tales 17]]''
*'''[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]]'''
